text.font-family: 'Segoe Print', 'Bradley Hand', 'Comic Sans MS', 'Caveat', 'Patrick Hand', cursive, sans-serif
text.tspan: canon-signer: canon-signer holds a 32-byte Ed25519 private key. Forging a matching signature is cryptographically infeasible.

text.font-family: 'Segoe Print', 'Bradley Hand', 'Comic Sans MS', 'Caveat', 'Patrick Hand', cursive, sans-serif
text.tspan: canon-signer: Every fact embeds parent_hash of the previous one. Insert attempts break the chain.

text.font-family: 'Segoe Print', 'Bradley Hand', 'Comic Sans MS', 'Caveat', 'Patrick Hand', cursive, sans-serif
'Segoe Print', 'Bradley Hand', 'Comic Sans MS', 'Caveat', 'Patrick Hand', cursive, sans-serif
text.tspan: Old world: Rip out a page — the numbering breaks.

text.font-family: 'Segoe Print', 'Bradley Hand', 'Comic Sans MS', 'Caveat', 'Patrick Hand', cursive, sans-serif
text.tspan: canon-signer: Change any byte → hash changes → every later fact's parent_hash is wrong.
